name: X Proof Of Engagement Agent
description: Accepts proof URLs, timestamps, optional screenshot hashes, and campaign IDs for legitimate reviewed actions.
degenPitch: Receipts for real proof, not fake noise.
whatItDoes: Creates compliant campaign or proof-review workflow.
Requires human approval and platform-rule compliance.
Uses receipt-gated rewards after proof review.
cursorPrompt: Build a X Proof Of Engagement Agent using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
suggestedPrompt: Build a X Proof Of Engagement Agent using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
